title: Piglin Buff
body:
Piglin Buff

Overview

Piglin Buff is a data pack that enhances Piglin bartering by expanding the loot table with new and exciting trade options. From rare Netherite items to useful resources and custom potions, this pack makes trading with Piglins more rewarding and dynamic.

Barter Rewards & Probabilities

All chances are calculated out of a total weight of 500.

Very Rare (< 1%)

Item Probability
Netherite Ingot0.2%
Ancient Debris0.8%
Netherite Scrap0.8%
Enchanted Netherite Hoe0.4%

Rare (1 – 2%)

Item Probability
Enchanted Book (Soul Speed)1.0%
Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template1.0%
Wither Skeleton Skull1.0%
Enchanted Iron Boots (Soul Speed)1.6%
Potion of Fire Resistance1.6%
Splash Potion of Fire Resistance1.6%
Water Bottle2.0%
Iron Nuggets (10–36)2.0%
Ender Pearls (2–4)2.0%
Ghast Tear2.0%
Dried Ghast2.0%

Uncommon (4 – 6%)

Item Probability
String (3–9)4.0%
Nether Quartz (5–12)4.0%
Nether Wart (1–4)6.0%

Common (8%)

Item Probability
Obsidian8.0%
Crying Obsidian (1–3)8.0%
Fire Charge8.0%
Leather (2–4)8.0%
Soul Sand (2–8)8.0%
Nether Brick (2–8)8.0%
Spectral Arrows (6–12)8.0%
Gravel (8–16)8.0%
Blackstone (8–16)8.0%

Installation

  1. Download the latest Piglin Buff .zip from Modrinth.
  2. Place the piglin_buff folder inside your world’s datapacks directory.
  3. Launch the game and run /reload or restart your server.

Enjoy a richer and more exciting Piglin trading experience!
